stage.subtitle_ar: حوّلي عملكِ الميداني إلى بياناتٍ دقيقة، وأرقامٍ واضحة، وتقاريرَ مهنية تصنع فرقاً حقيقياً في حماية الحياة الفطرية.

content.intro_ar: كل قرارٍ في حماية الحياة الفطرية يبدأ من بياناتٍ جيّدة. في هذا الدرس ستتعلّمين لغة جمع البيانات في الميدان بالإنجليزية: المسوحات، والإحصاءات، والعيّنات، وتدوين الملاحظات. عباراتٌ بسيطة تجعل تسجيل عملكِ اليومي أوضحَ وأدقّ.

vocab.meaning_en: facts and numbers collected for study
vocab.example: We collect data during every field survey.

vocab.meaning_en: a careful count or study of an area
vocab.example: The team carried out a survey of the reserve.

vocab.meaning_en: the number of animals or plants recorded
vocab.example: The count showed forty oryx in the valley.

vocab.meaning_en: a small part used to represent the whole
vocab.example: She took a soil sample near the water.

vocab.meaning_en: to write down information
vocab.example: Please record the time of each sighting.

vocab.meaning_en: something you notice and note down
vocab.example: Every observation goes into the notebook.

vocab.meaning_en: work done outdoors, not in an office
vocab.example: We spend three days a week doing fieldwork.

vocab.meaning_en: correct and exact
vocab.example: Accurate data helps us protect species.

vocab.meaning_en: a fixed line walked to count wildlife
vocab.example: We walked the same transect at dawn.

vocab.meaning_en: a collected group of data
vocab.example: The dataset covers three years of counts.

vocab.meaning_en: a book for daily field records
vocab.example: The logbook holds every day's observations.

paragraphs: Every wildlife project begins with good data. At the National Center for Wildlife, a team starts its fieldwork before sunrise, when animals are most active. The first task is a survey of the reserve. The rangers walk a fixed line called a transect and count every animal they see. They record the species, the number, and the exact time of each observation.

Nadia leads the count today. She writes each sighting in her logbook and takes a small sample of plants near the water. Later, she will add every note to the project's dataset on the computer. A clean dataset makes the next report much easier to write.

Accurate work matters. If the count is wrong, the whole study is wrong, and managers may make poor decisions about the reserve. So the team checks the numbers twice and compares notes before they leave the field. Good observation and careful records are the base of every good decision.

By nine o'clock, the survey is finished. The team has counted thirty-eight oryx and recorded twelve bird species. It is only a small sample of one morning, but over many months these counts build a clear picture of how the wildlife is doing.

key_phrases.en: We recorded 38 animals during the survey.
The count took place at dawn.
We took a sample near the water.
Each observation is written in the logbook.
key_phrases.ar: تُدوَّن كل ملاحظة في السجلّ الميداني.

key_phrases.en: The data was collected along a fixed transect.
key_phrases.ar: جُمِعت البيانات على مسار مسحٍ ثابت.

key_phrases.en: Please make sure the numbers are accurate.

comprehension.question: What is a transect?
options: A fixed line walked to count wildlife
comprehension.correct: A fixed line walked to count wildlife
comprehension.explanation_ar: الترانسِكت مسارٌ ثابت تسير عليه لتَعُدّي الكائنات، فتُقارَن الأعداد على نفس الخط في كل مرة.

comprehension.question: Why does the team start fieldwork before sunrise?
options: Because animals are most active then
Because it is cooler for the computer
comprehension.correct: Because animals are most active then
comprehension.explanation_ar: يبدأ الفريق قبل الشروق لأن الحيوانات تكون أكثر نشاطاً في ذلك الوقت، فيسهل رصدها وعدّها.

comprehension.question: Where does Nadia write each sighting?
comprehension.explanation_ar: تدوّن نادية كل مشاهدة في السجلّ الميداني (logbook) أولاً، ثم تنقلها لاحقاً إلى مجموعة البيانات.

comprehension.question: Why does accurate data matter?
options: It looks nicer on the screen
Wrong data can lead to poor decisions
comprehension.correct: Wrong data can lead to poor decisions
comprehension.explanation_ar: البيانات الدقيقة مهمّة لأن الأرقام الخاطئة قد تقود المسؤولين إلى قراراتٍ سيّئة بشأن المحمية.

comprehension.question: What does the team do before leaving the field?
options: They check the numbers twice and compare notes
They go straight to the office
comprehension.correct: They check the numbers twice and compare notes
comprehension.explanation_ar: قبل مغادرة الميدان يراجع الفريق الأرقام مرّتين ويقارنون ملاحظاتهم لضمان دقّة البيانات.

task.prompt_en: Describe a morning of fieldwork. Write 4–5 sentences about how you collect and record data.
task.prompt_ar: صِفي صباحاً من العمل الميداني. اكتبي ٤–٥ جُمل عن كيف تجمعين البيانات وتسجّلينها.
task.guidance_ar: استخدمي أربع كلمات على الأقل من كلمات الدرس مثل survey و count و record و data.

content.intro_ar: الأرقام تروي قصة النوع؛ فهل تعداد المها يرتفع أم ينخفض؟ في هذا الدرس ستتقنين وصف الاتجاهات والأرقام بالإنجليزية: الزيادة والنقصان، والارتفاع والانخفاض، والنسب المئوية. ستتمكّنين من قول جملةٍ مثل «زاد عدد المها بنسبة عشرين بالمئة» بثقة.

vocab.meaning_en: to become larger in number
vocab.example: The oryx population increased last year.

vocab.meaning_en: to become smaller in number
vocab.example: The number of hunters decreased after the ban.

vocab.meaning_en: to go up
vocab.example: Bird numbers rose during the wet season.

vocab.meaning_en: to go down
vocab.example: Water levels fell in the summer.

vocab.meaning_en: the general direction of change over time
vocab.example: The trend shows a slow recovery.

vocab.meaning_en: a part of a whole out of 100
vocab.example: The percentage of nesting birds grew by ten.

vocab.meaning_en: all the animals of one species in an area
vocab.example: The gazelle population is stable now.

vocab.meaning_en: to increase in size or number
vocab.example: The herd grew from fifty to eighty.

vocab.meaning_en: a steady fall over time
vocab.example: Coral reefs are in decline in warm water.

vocab.meaning_en: not changing much
vocab.example: The numbers stayed stable for three years.

vocab.meaning_en: measured against something else
vocab.example: Numbers are higher compared to last year.

vocab.meaning_en: to become twice as many
vocab.example: The count almost doubled in five years.

paragraphs: Numbers tell the story of a species. When we study wildlife, we do not just count once; we count every year and look at the trend over time. A trend can go up or down, and each direction means something different for the reserve.

Take the Arabian oryx. Fifty years ago the wild population fell to zero because of hunting. After a strong reintroduction programme, the numbers began to rise. Today the population has grown from a few animals to more than a thousand. Compared to the 1970s, that is a huge increase.

Not every story is good news. The number of some birds has decreased, and a few species are still in decline. When a population falls year after year, managers must act quickly. When it stays stable, they can watch and wait.

We often describe change with percentages. We might say that nesting birds increased by fifteen percent, or that water use decreased by a quarter. Sometimes a healthy population can even double in a few years. Clear numbers and a clear trend help everyone — rangers, managers, and partners — understand what is really happening in nature, and decide what to do next.

key_phrases.en: The number of oryx increased by 20 percent.
Compared to last year, numbers are higher.
The trend shows a steady decline.
The numbers stayed stable over three years.
key_phrases.ar: بقيت الأعداد مستقرّة على مدى ثلاث سنوات.

key_phrases.en: There was a sharp fall in the summer.

comprehension.question: What does a "trend" show?
options: The general direction of change over time
comprehension.correct: The general direction of change over time
comprehension.explanation_ar: الاتّجاه (trend) يُظهر الاتّجاه العام للتغيّر عبر الزمن — هل الأعداد ترتفع أم تنخفض على مدى سنوات.

comprehension.question: What happened to the wild oryx population fifty years ago?
comprehension.explanation_ar: قبل خمسين عاماً انخفض التعداد البرّي للمها إلى الصفر بسبب الصيد الجائر.

comprehension.question: How has the oryx population changed since the reintroduction programme?
options: It has grown to more than a thousand
comprehension.correct: It has grown to more than a thousand
comprehension.explanation_ar: بعد برنامج إعادة التوطين نما تعداد المها من أفرادٍ قليلة إلى أكثر من ألف — وهذه زيادة كبيرة.

comprehension.question: When a population falls year after year, what should managers do?
comprehension.explanation_ar: عندما ينخفض التعداد عاماً بعد عام، على المسؤولين التحرّك بسرعة قبل أن يتفاقم التراجع.

comprehension.question: Which sentence describes numbers that do not change much?
comprehension.explanation_ar: كلمة stable تصف الأعداد التي تبقى مستقرّة ولا تتغيّر كثيراً.

comprehension.question: What does "increased by fifteen percent" describe?
comprehension.explanation_ar: «increased by fifteen percent» تعني ارتفاعاً في الأعداد بمقدار ١٥ بالمئة.

task.prompt_en: Look at your reserve's animal counts for two years. Write 4–5 sentences describing how the numbers changed.
task.prompt_ar: انظري إلى إحصاءات الحيوانات في محميتكِ خلال عامين. اكتبي ٤–٥ جُمل تصفين فيها كيف تغيّرت الأرقام.
task.guidance_ar: استخدمي كلماتٍ مثل increase و decrease و trend و percentage، واذكري نسبة مئوية واحدة على الأقل.

content.intro_ar: التقرير الجيّد يحوّل يوماً مزدحماً في الميدان إلى معلومةٍ يستفيد منها الجميع. في هذا الدرس ستتعلّمين بناء تقريرٍ ميداني بسيط بالإنجليزية: الملخّص، والطريقة، والنتائج، والخلاصة — مع زمن الماضي والمبني للمجهول، ولغةٍ واضحة ومهنية.

vocab.meaning_en: a written account of work or findings
vocab.example: She wrote a short report after the survey.

vocab.meaning_en: a short account of the main points
vocab.example: The summary is only two sentences long.

vocab.meaning_en: the results of a study
vocab.example: The findings show a healthy population.

vocab.meaning_en: the way the work was done
vocab.example: The method section explains how we counted.

vocab.meaning_en: the numbers and facts you found
vocab.example: The results are shown in a simple table.

vocab.meaning_en: the final judgement of a report
vocab.example: In conclusion, the reserve is doing well.

vocab.meaning_en: to suggest what should be done
vocab.example: We recommend more visits in spring.

vocab.meaning_en: checking something regularly over time
vocab.example: Monitoring helps us notice problems early.

vocab.meaning_en: one part of a document
vocab.example: Each report has four main sections.

vocab.meaning_en: easy to understand
vocab.example: Keep the language clear and short.

vocab.meaning_en: to send work to someone officially
vocab.example: Please submit the report by Thursday.

reading.title_en: How to Write a Field Report
paragraphs: A good field report is short, clear, and easy to read. It turns a busy day in the field into information that others can use. Most reports follow the same simple structure, with four main sections.

The report usually opens with a short summary. In one or two sentences, it says what was done and what was found. After the summary comes the method: this section explains how the work was carried out. Because we describe past actions, we often use the past tense and the passive voice — for example, "The survey was carried out at dawn" or "Samples were collected near the water."

Next come the results. Here the writer gives the numbers and the main findings, often in a small table so they are easy to read. The last section is the conclusion. It gives a clear judgement and may recommend the next step, such as more monitoring or a repeat survey.

Before you submit a report, read it once more. Remove long words, check every number, and make sure each section is clear. A short, honest report that anyone can understand is far more useful than a long one that no one finishes. Good monitoring depends on good reports, so this final step is always worth the time.

key_phrases.en: The survey was carried out at dawn.
Data were collected along the transect.
key_phrases.ar: جُمِعت البيانات على طول مسار المسح.

key_phrases.en: The results show that the population is stable.
In conclusion, the reserve is healthy.
We recommend a repeat survey next spring.
key_phrases.ar: نوصي بإعادة المسح في الربيع القادم.

key_phrases.en: The report was submitted on Thursday.

comprehension.question: How many main sections does most field report have (in the reading)?
comprehension.explanation_ar: يتّبع أغلب التقارير الميدانية بنيةً بسيطة من أربعة أقسام رئيسية: الملخّص، والطريقة، والنتائج، والخلاصة.

comprehension.question: What does the summary do?
options: It lists every animal by name
It says what was done and what was found
comprehension.correct: It says what was done and what was found
comprehension.explanation_ar: الملخّص يقول في جملةٍ أو جملتين ما الذي تمّ عمله وما الذي تمّ التوصّل إليه.

comprehension.question: Why do reports often use the passive voice and past tense?
comprehension.explanation_ar: تصف التقارير أفعالاً حدثت في الماضي، لذلك نستخدم زمن الماضي والمبني للمجهول مثل «The survey was carried out».

comprehension.question: Where does the writer give the numbers and main findings?
comprehension.explanation_ar: تُعرَض الأرقام والنتائج الرئيسية في قسم النتائج (results)، غالباً في جدولٍ صغير سهل القراءة.

comprehension.question: What should you do before you submit a report?
options: Read it again and check every number
Add as many long words as possible
comprehension.correct: Read it again and check every number
comprehension.explanation_ar: قبل التسليم، اقرئي التقرير مرّة أخرى وتحقّقي من كل رقم، وتأكّدي أن كل قسمٍ واضح.

comprehension.question: What does the conclusion often do?
comprehension.explanation_ar: الخلاصة تعطي حكماً واضحاً وقد توصي بالخطوة التالية، مثل مزيدٍ من الرصد أو إعادة المسح.

task.prompt_en: Write a short field report about a survey in your reserve. Use four sections: summary, method, results, and conclusion.
task.prompt_ar: اكتبي تقريراً ميدانياً قصيراً عن مسحٍ في محميتكِ، مستخدمةً الأقسام الأربعة: الملخّص، والطريقة، والنتائج، والخلاصة.
task.guidance_ar: استخدمي زمن الماضي والمبني للمجهول (مثل: The survey was carried out)، وأدرِجي رقماً واحداً على الأقل من نتائجكِ.
